extra.message: User input from the 'name' query parameter is directly embedded into a Jinja2 template string and rendered without escaping. This allows Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI). An attacker can inject template syntax like {{7*6}} to execute arbitrary code.

cwe: CWE-94: Improper Control of Generation of Code

extra.message: User input from the 'name' query parameter is directly concatenated into HTML content without escaping. This allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) attacks. An attacker can inject HTML/JavaScript like <script>alert('xss')</script>.

cwe: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation

extra.message: Hardcoded secret credential 'SUPER_SECRET_NAME' is present in the code. This sensitive value should be loaded from environment variables instead of being hardcoded.
Hardcoded secret credential 'SUPER_SECRET_TOKEN' is present in the code. This sensitive authentication token should be loaded from environment variables instead of being hardcoded.
